_doc: Bank $12 monster-library / family-tab menu window-draw layout streams. Contiguous packed run $710c..$7b9b. Each layout: dest-position word + rows of literal tile ids; $d8=newline (dest += $20), $d9=terminator. Drawn by the $40c3 loop via ReadPtrFromDE. ld_de_ref=true => reached by `ld de,$imm` from the menu code; the rest are part of the packed run. See DATA_STRUCTURES.
